testsuite.name: tests.TC11_PaymentCheckout

testcase.name: verifyPaymentCheckout
testcase.system-out: hover over is done Running vali-valid data username and password entered successfully product searched successfully Control moved to search result page Product added to cart Clicked on proceed to buy
